name: Accelerated Amortization of Pollution Control Facilities

eligibility.description: Applies to new identifiable treatment facilities used in connection with plants in operation before 1976, or certain atmospheric pollution control facilities for coal-fired plants placed in service after April 11, 2005.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to elect to amortize the basis of certified pollution control facilities over a 60-month (or 84-month for certain coal-fired plants) period instead of longer standard depreciation schedules.
